days.title: Arrival Srinagar
activities: Meet our representative at Srinagar airport, transfer to hotel / Houseboat. Afternoon, leave for local sightseeing of Srinagar City.
Visit: Mughal  gardens: Chesma Shahi (Mughal Spring), Nishat (The Garden of Bliss), Shalimar (The Abode of Love).
In the evening, shikara ride in world famous Dal lake.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.

days.title: Srinagar - Gulmarg - Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Gulmarg for a daytrip via Tangmarg.
Enroute you will visit Apple Orchards, Cherry Orchards and Strawberry fields.
In Gulmarg visit Khilanmarg and take a ride in worlds highest cable car "Gondola" or enjoy your day by playing golf in the world’s highest golf course.
Return to Srinagar in the evening after enjoying your day.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.
days.highlight: Apple Orchards, Cherry Orchards and Strawberry fields, Gondola ride.

days.title: Srinagar - Pahalgam - Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Pahalgam for a daytrip.
Enroute visit Awantipora Ruins, Saffron Fields.
In Pahalgam you can visit: Aru, Betaab valley (on your own cost).
Return to Srinagar in the evening after enjoying your day.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.
days.highlight: Awantipora Ruins, Saffron Fields, Aru valley and Betaab valley (on your own cost),

days.title: Departure
activities: After breakfast, check out from Hotel and drive to Srinagar Airport.

days.title: Arrival Srinagar
activities: Meet our representative at Srinagar airport, transfer to hotel / Houseboat.
Afternoon, leave for local sightseeing of Srinagar City.
Visit Mughal  gardens: Chesma Shahi (Mughal Spring), Nishat (The Garden of Bliss), Shalimar (The Abode of Love).
In the evening, shikara ride in world famous Dal lake.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Mughal Gardens, Shikara ride.

days.title: Srinagar - Gulmarg - Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Gulmarg for a daytrip via Tangmarg.
Enroute visit Apple orchards, Cherry orchards and Strawberry fields.
In Gulmarg visit Khilanmarg and take a ride in worlds highest cable car "Gondola" or enjoy your day by playing golf in the world’s highest golf course.
Return to Srinagar in the evening after enjoying your day.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Gondola ride, Apple orchards, cherry orchards, strawberry orchards.

days.title: Srinagar – Pahalgam – Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Pahalgam for a daytrip.
Enroute visit Awantipora Ruins, Saffron Fields.
In Pahalgam you can visit Aru valley , Betaab valley (on your own cost).
Return to Srinagar in the evening after enjoying your day.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Awantipora Ruins, Aru valley , Betaab valley (on your own cost)

days.title: Srinagar – Sonmarg – Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Sonmarg for a daytrip.
Enroute see Hazratbal Shrine, Gagangir Tourist Village.
The drive from Srinagar to Sonmarg is very beautiful as you will pass through some Towns and villages, at many places you can enjoy the view of paddy fields with rivers flowing on one side.
In Sonmarg you can visit Thajwas Glacier which is around 4 Kms from Sonmarg, a local taxi has to be hired for it.
The name Sonmarg is derived from two Kashmiri words “Son” & “Marg” which mean “Gold” & “Meadow”, when put together it means “Meadow of Gold”.
Return to Srinagar in the evening after enjoying your day.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Hazratbal Shrine, Gagangir Tourist Village, Thajwas Glacier

days.title: Departure
activities: After breakfast, check out from Hotel and drive to Srinagar Airport

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar & Shikara Ride
activities: Meet our representative at Srinagar airport, transfer to hotel / Houseboat.
In the evening, shikara ride in world famous Dal lake.
Overnight stay at Srinagar.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Gulmarg via Tangmarg.
Enroute visit Apple Orchards, Cherry Orchards and Strawberry fields.
In Gulmarg visit Khilanmarg and take a ride in worlds highest cable car "Gondola" or enjoy your day by playing golf in the world’s highest golf course.
Overnight stay at Gulmarg.
Highlights of the Day: Apple Orchards, Cherry Orchards and Strawberry fields, Gondola ride

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Pahalgam,
Enroute visit Awantipora Ruins, Saffron Fields.
In Pahalgam you can visit Aru valley, Betaab valley (on your own cost).
Overnight stay at Pahalgam
Highlights of the Day: Awantipora Ruins, Saffron Fields, Aru valley and Betaab valley (on your own cost).

days.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar & Mughal Garden
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Srinagar, check in hotel.
Afternoon, leave for local sightseeing of Srinagar City.
Visit Mughal  gardens, Chesma Shahi (Mughal Spring), Nishat (The Garden of Bliss), Shalimar (The Abode of Love).
Overnight stay at Srinagar
Highlights of the Day: Mughal  gardens, Chesma Shahi, Nishat, Shalimar.

days.title: Srinagar - Sonmarg - Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Sonmarg for a daytrip.
Enroute see Hazratbal Shrine, Gagangir Tourist Village.
The drive from Srinagar to Sonmarg is very beautiful as you will pass through some Towns and villages, at many places you can enjoy the view of paddy fields with rivers flowing on one side.

In Sonmarg you can visit Thajwas Glacier which is around 4 Kms from Sonmarg, a local taxi has to be hired for it.  The name Sonmarg is derived from two Kashmiri words “Son” & “Marg” which mean “Gold” & “Meadow”, when put together it means “Meadow of Gold”.
Return to Srinagar in the evening after enjoying your day. Overnight stay at Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Hazratbal Shrine, Gagangir Tourist Village, Thajwas Glacier

days.title: Departure
activities: After breakfast, check out from Hotel and drive to Srinagar Airport.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
activities: On reaching Srinagar, meet our representative and transfer to your hotel or houseboat for check-in and relaxation.
In the evening, enjoy a peaceful Shikara ride on the picturesque Dal Lake, witnessing floating gardens, local life, and stunning mountain views.
You will stay overnight in Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Shikara ride in Dal lake, floating market exploration.

days.title: Srinagar Sightseeing
activities: After breakfast, visit the famous Mughal Gardens – Nishat Bagh, Shalimar Bagh, and Chashme Shahi. Later, explore the revered Hazratbal Shrine, beautifully located on the banks of Dal Lake.
Continue your day with a visit to Pari Mahal, a historic monument offering panoramic views of Srinagar and Dal Lake, perfect for photography and peaceful moments.
Overnight stay in Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Mughal Gardens, Hazratbal Shrine, Pari Mahal

days.title: Transfer to Pahalgam
activities: After breakfast, check out and drive to Pahalgam, a picturesque valley known as the ‘Valley of Shepherds’.
On the way, stop by lush apple orchards and explore the ancient Avantipura ruins, remnants of 9th-century Hindu temples built by King Avantivarman.
You will have an overnight stay in Pahalgam.
Highlights of the Day: Avantipura ruins

days.title: Aru & Betaab Valley Excursion
activities: After breakfast, head out for a scenic drive to Aru Valley, a peaceful spot known for its lush meadows, pine forests, and mountain views, ideal for nature walks and photography.
Continue to Betaab Valley, a stunning location with crystal-clear streams and snow-capped peaks, made famous by Bollywood films.
Return to Pahalgam for an overnight stay.
Highlights of the Day: Aru valley, Betaab valley

days.title: Transfer to Gulmarg
activities: After breakfast, check out from Pahalgam and proceed to Gulmarg, a scenic hill station known for its meadows, pine forests, and snow-capped peaks.
Arrive and check in to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, relax at your resort or take a walk through the beautiful surroundings.
Overnight stay in Gulmarg.

days.title: Gondola ride and Transfer to Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, enjoy the thrilling Gondola ride in Gulmarg (Phase 1 or 2, as per your preference), offering breathtaking views of snow-covered mountains and alpine landscapes.
Later, check out and drive back to Srinagar.
Overnight stay in Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Gondola ride

days.title: Departure from Srinagar Airport
activities: After breakfast, check out and transfer to the airport for your onward journey with cherished memories of Kashmir.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
activities: Arrive in Srinagar and meet your representative for a transfer to your charming houseboat on Dal Lake.
In the evening, unwind with a peaceful Shikara ride and stroll along the scenic Boulevard Road.
You will have an overnight stay in the houseboat in Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Shikara ride, Boulevard road.

days.title: Srinagar Local Tour
activities: After breakfast at your houseboat, begin your Srinagar local tour with visits to the beautiful Mughal Gardens – Nishat Bagh, Shalimar Bagh, and Chashme Shahi.
Later, explore the sacred Hazratbal Shrine and enjoy panoramic views of Srinagar from the historic Pari Mahal.
Overnight stay in Srinagar.
Highlights of the Day: Mughal Gardens, Hazratbal Shrine, Pari Mahal.

days.title: Drive to Gurez
activities: Start your day early with a scenic drive to Gurez Valley, passing by the stunning Wular Lake and the breathtaking Razdan Pass.
Upon arrival, explore Dawar Village, where you’ll experience the unique culture and serene beauty of this remote Himalayan gem.
You will have an overnight stay in Gurez.
Highlights of the Day: Wular lake, Razdan pass

days.title: Gurez Exploration Day
activities: After breakfast, head out to explore the scenic Gurez Valley. Gurez Valley is a remote Himalayan paradise, known for its dramatic mountain landscapes, rich cultural heritage, and untouched natural beauty, making it one of Kashmir’s most offbeat and captivating destinations.
Visit the iconic Habba Khatoon Peak and Spring, surrounded by folklore and natural beauty.
Later, drive to Tulail Valley, a remote and pristine region known for its wooden houses, alpine views, and peaceful village charm.
Overnight stay in Gurez.
Highlights of the Day: Gurez Valley, Habba Khatoon Peak, Tulail Valley

days.title: Transfer to Pahalgam
activities: After breakfast, begin your drive to the beautiful valley of Pahalgam, enjoying scenic views along the way.
On arrival, check in to your hotel and spend the evening at leisure, unwinding amidst the serene surroundings.
Stay overnight in Pahalgam.

days.title: Sightseeing in Pahalgam
activities: After breakfast, head out to explore Pahalgam’s scenic gems, start with the lush meadows of Aru Valley, ideal for nature walks and photography.
Continue to the picturesque Betaab Valley and the serene Chandanwari, where you’ll be surrounded by snow-capped peaks and flowing streams.
You will have an overnight stay in Pahalgam.
Highlights of the Day: Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, Chandanwari

days.title: Return to Srinagar
activities: After breakfast, check out from your hotel and drive back to Srinagar, soaking in the beautiful views along the way.
Upon arrival, check in to your houseboat and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.
You will have an overnight stay in Srinagar.

days.title: Departure
activities: After breakfast, check out from your houseboat and transfer to Srinagar Airport for your onward journey.
Your tour ends here, take beautiful memories of Kashmir with you.
Gurez is a remote area with limited mobile networks (only BSNL).
Accommodation is basic but comfortable (local guesthouses/homestays).
Best travel time: May to September (roads remain closed Dec–March).
SUVs like Innova/Scorpio are recommended for this route.
